name: buildbuddy
description: Troubleshoot BuildBuddy invocations, compare cache behavior, reproduce remote actions, inspect flaky tests, diagnose log snippets, and analyze usage.

interface.shortDescription: Debug BuildBuddy invocations, logs, flakes, and usage
interface.longDescription: Use BuildBuddy to troubleshoot invocations, compare cache and action behavior, reproduce remote actions with bb execute, inspect recent flaky tests, diagnose BuildBuddy or bb CLI log snippets, and analyze billing or usage trends while protecting API keys.
defaultPrompt: Analyze BuildBuddy usage for this group
Fetch recent flaky tests from BuildBuddy
